title: Intent Orchestration Object
description: Defines the AI-reasoned pipeline plan generated from a silent source scan and a declared intent goal. The human is the approver of a pre-reasoned data landscape, not an operator of individual mappings.

silentScan.description: AI reads all available AEP source connections and raw data simultaneously before the user takes any action

sourcesScanned.description: All active and staged AEP source connections evaluated during the scan

recordDepth.description: How far back this source's data goes. Example: 24 months

identityFields.description: Fields identified as likely identity or join keys

volatilityScore.description: Historical field change frequency observed by AI

identityCollisions.description: Identity fields that collide across sources and require AI resolution

intentDeclaration.description: The goal the architect provides. Used by AI to reason about which AEP flows to construct and what the resulting Unified Profile will look like.

goalStatement.description: Plain language goal from the data architect
goalStatement.example: Build a longitudinal customer journey view across all active sources to support downstream segmentation and activation

successCriteria.description: What a high-quality Unified Profile outcome looks like for this intent
example: Complete longitudinal record per customer identity
No identity fragmentation across source connections
Temporal continuity across all experience event types
All target XDM schema fields populated above threshold

orchestrationPlan.description: AI-constructed AEP pipeline plan based on silent scan results and declared intent. Presented to the architect for approval, not construction.

recommendedFlows.description: Ordered list of AEP dataflows the AI recommends activating to achieve the stated intent

targetSchema.description: XDM target schema for this flow

rationale.description: Why this flow is necessary for the stated intent

profileContribution.description: What this flow adds to the AEP Unified Profile

autoResolved.description: Whether AI resolved all conflicts in this flow without human input

profileIntegrityScore.description: Predicted quality of the AEP Unified Profile if all recommended flows are approved and activated

identityCompleteness.description: Percentage of records with a resolved, non-fragmented identity in the Identity Graph

temporalCoverage.description: Percentage of the intended time range with sufficient ExperienceEvent density

fieldCoverage.description: Percentage of target XDM schema fields that will be populated

conflictResolutionRate.description: Percentage of detected conflicts resolved automatically

scoreJustification.description: Plain language summary of what is driving the score up or down

predictedUnifiedProfile.description: A visual preview of the AEP merged record structure before any ingestion occurs

resolvedIdentityKey.description: The XDM identity key the AI will use after resolving namespace collisions

sampleMergedRecord.description: Representative preview of what a resolved XDM profile record will look like

approvalStatus.description: Architect approval state for the full orchestration plan. Batch approval. Not per-field.

exceptionItems.description: The only items surfaced for human review. AI handles everything else automatically.

metadata.sprintContext: Data Mapping with Intent — POC Day 1 v3
metadata.paradigm: Automated Data Orchestration. Human as approver, not operator.
